title: Babes in Arms
writer: Jack McGowan, Kay Van Riper, Richard Rodgers
actors: Mickey Rooney, Judy Garland, Charles Winninger
plot: A group of vaudevillians struggling to compete with talkies hits the road hoping for a comeback. Frustrated to be left behind, all of their kids put on a show themselves to raise money for the families and to prove they've got tal...
